tech_stack.frontend: React 18, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, Tailwind CSS, Vite

current_mission.title: Modern Design Rebranding - X/Twitter-like Design System
current_mission.description: Research and plan comprehensive modern design rebranding with X/Twitter-like aesthetics, dark theme, orange accents, glassmorphism effects, and all activity driving to dumuwaks.ementech.co.ke
deliverables_completed: .ai/research/X_TWITTER_DESIGN_PATTERNS.md - Complete analysis of X/Twitter 2024-2025 design patterns including color system, layout architecture, typography, and component patterns
.ai/research/MODERN_MARKETPLACE_UI.md - Comprehensive marketplace UI/UX best practices from TaskRabbit, Thumbtack, Fiverr, and others
.ai/research/DARK_THEME_GUIDE.md - WCAG-compliant dark theme implementation guide with color system, contrast requirements, and accessibility standards
.ai/research/GRID_FLEX_LAYOUT_PATTERNS.md - Modern CSS layout patterns using Grid and Flexbox for responsive design
.ai/research/GLASSMORPHISM_GUIDE.md - Glassmorphism UI design guide with implementation techniques and best practices
.ai/research/KENYAN_MARKET_CONTEXT.md - Mobile-first design considerations specific to the Kenyan market
.ai/research/DESIGN_SYSTEM_ARCHITECTURE.md - Complete design system specification with design tokens, component library structure, and implementation guidelines
.ai/plans/MIGRATION_ROADMAP.md - Detailed 11-week implementation plan with phases, tasks, timelines, and success criteria
